problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: Combining Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
